सारांश चरणों में प्रतिक्रिया प्रदान करें.
reference_output:
अगर आप नेल पॉलिश हटाने के लिए परेशान हो रहे हैं और आपके पास कोई नेल पॉलिश रिमूवर भी नही है तो चिंता मत कीजिये, आप विभिन्न प्रकार के “सामान्य घरेलू उत्पादों (common household products)” के द्वारा अपने पुराने “नेल पॉलिश को हटा” सकते हैं |

1. नेल पॉलिश को निकालने के लिए अल्कोहल और अल्कोहल-बेस्ड प्रोडक्ट्स का उपयोग करें:
2. सफ़ेद सिरका या विनेगर (white vinegar or vinegar) सलूशन को नीम्बू के रस में मिलाकर नेल पॉलिश हटाने के लिए उपयोग करें:
3. पॉलिश को रगड़ने के लिए टूथपेस्ट (toothpaste) का उपयोग करें:
4. दो भाग हाइड्रोजन पेरोक्साइड (hydrogen peroxide) और एक भाग गर्म पानी को मिलाकर उसमे 10 मिनट तक नाखून भिगोये रखें:
5. एक शक्तिशाली साल्वेंट या पेंट रिमूवर का उपयोग वैकल्पिक रूप से ही करें, आमतौर पर इनको यूज़ करने की सलाह नहीं दी जाती:
6. चुने गये प्रोडक्ट को एक कॉटन बॉल पर लगाएं:
7. अब इसे एक मिनट के लिए सूखने दें:
8. पॉलिश को हटाने के लिए अपने नाखूनों से प्रोडक्ट को साफ़ कर लें:
9. अपने हाथों को गर्म पानी में भिगोये, रगड़ें और पोलिश निकालें और ऐसा बार-बार करें:
10. बहुत जल्दी न सूखने वाले नेल पॉलिश को चुनें:
11. पॉलिश को एक संत में एक ही नाखून पर लगायें:
12. नए पॉलिश को जल्दी से पोंछकर हटा दें:
13. नाखून से पॉलिश पूरी तरह से निकल जाने तक पेंटिंग और पोंछने की प्रक्रिया को दोहराते रहें:
14. ग्लू और पानी से बेस कोट बनायें:
15. पॉलिश लगाने से पहले ग्लू-बेस कोट को लगाये और सूखने दें:
16. नेल पॉलिश लगायें:
17. जब आप पॉलिश निकालने के लिए तैयार हों तब नाखूनों को भिगोयें:
18. पुराने नेल पॉलिश को निकाल दें:
base_response:
##  नाइल पॉलिश हटाने के लिए रिमूवर के बिना आसान तरीके: 

**ध्यान रखें:** ये तरीके प्रभावी नहीं होते हैं और बहुत समय लेते हैं। 

**1.  साफ़ कपड़े और नैपकिन:**
    *  एक साफ कपड़ा या नैपकिन पर लकड़ी की चम्मच से  नाइल पॉलिश को पकड़ें और धीरे-धीरे हटाएं। 
    *  यह काम करने में समय लेता है और नई जगहों पर चिपचिपापन हो सकता है। 

**2.  बर्फ:**
    *  बर्फ का उपयोग एक सहायक विकल्प हो सकता है।
    *  नाइल पॉलिश को बर्फ से धीरे-धीरे हटाएं।
    *  यह थोड़ा समय लेता है और इसे साफ करने में थोड़ा सा धैर्य की ज़रूरत होगी।

**3.  तेल या तेल का तेल:**
    *  एक तेल या तेल का तेल को पॉलिश के ऊपर रखें।
    *  अनुपस्थित होने तक कुछ समय दें।
    *  सफेद कपड़े या नैपकिन के साथ पॉलिश को हटा दें।

**4.  बिजली:**
    *  नाइल पॉलिश को गर्म पानी से धीरे-धीरे हटाएं। 
    *  यह तरीका प्रभावी नहीं होता है और नाजुक त्वचा के लिए नुकसान हो सकता है।


**ध्यान दें:** 

*  ये तरीके प्रभावी नहीं होते हैं और बहुत समय लेते हैं।
*  यदि आप इन तरीकों का उपयोग करते हैं, तो कृपया ध्यान रखें कि आपके नाखूनों पर नुकसान हो सकता है।
*  इन तरीकों को अपनाने से पहले, अपने नाखूनों की जांच करवाएं।
*  आपको अपने नाखूनों के स्वास्थ्य के लिए सलाह लेने के लिए किसी डॉक्टर या त्वचा विशेषज्ञ से संपर्क करना चाहिए।

instruction: "बेकन और अंडे" वाक्यांश को शामिल करते हुए एक रचनात्मक और चतुर खेल का आविष्कार करें।
reference_output: क्योंकि उसने सुना था कि वे बेकन और अंडे के डुबकी के लिए जा रहे हैं!
base_response:
##  The Bacon and Egg Escape

**The Setup:**

* **Players:** 2-4 players
* **Materials:** 
    * A large sheet of paper or whiteboard
    * Markers
    * A timer
    * A variety of "clues" (written on slips of paper, each with a different word related to bacon or eggs)

**The Game:**

1. **The Mission:** One player is designated as the "Chef" and the other players are "Bacon & Egg Explorers."  
2. **The Map:** The Chef creates a simple map on the paper or whiteboard with various locations represented by icons or drawings (e.g., a frying pan, a bacon strip, an egg, a kitchen).
3. **The Clues:** The Chef hides the clues around the room, or on the map, related to bacon or eggs. The clues could be:
    * Bacon-related: "Smoky aroma," "Crispy delight," "Salty goodness," "Crunchy bite"
    * Egg-related: "Sunny side up," "Festive yolk," "Gooey center," "Scrambled delight"
4. **The Escape:** The Egg Explorers must find all the clues and bring them back to the Chef. The Chef will then have to solve a riddle based on the collected clues. 
5. **The Challenge:** The Chef can make the riddles challenging, using wordplay, double meanings, or even visual clues. 
6. **The Winner:** The first team to successfully escape the "kitchen" (the room) by finding all the clues and solving the Chef's riddle wins.

**Example Clues and Riddles:**

* **Clue:** "Salty goodness" 
    * **Riddle:** I am crispy and salty, best with a side of bread. What am I? (Answer: Bacon)
* **Clue:** "Festive yolk"
    * **Riddle:** I'm yellow and round, a perfect addition to your morning. What am I? (Answer: Egg)

**Variations:**

* **Time Limit:** Set a time limit for each clue hunt.
* **Teamwork:** The Explorers can work together, or individually.
* **Difficulty Level:** Adjust the clues and riddles to the age and understanding of the players.

**Why this works:**

* **Interactive and Engaging:**  It combines the excitement of a game with the fun of exploring and solving puzzles.
*

instruction: भारत में सबसे प्रतिष्ठित सौंदर्य प्रतियोगिता कौन सी है? क्या आप इसका उत्तर हिन्दी में दे सकते हैं?
reference_output: भारत अपने वैश्विक सौंदर्य प्रतियोगिताओं के प्रतियोगियों का चयन चार प्रमुख आयोजनों से करता है । ये हैं मिस दिवा (मिस यूनिवर्स), फेमिना मिस इंडिया (मिस वर्ल्ड), ग्लेमनांड सुपरमोडल इंडिया (मिस इंटरनेशनल), और मिस डिवाइन ब्यूटी (मिस अर्थ)। ये सभी सौंदर्य प्रतियोगिताएं भारत में प्रतिष्ठित मानी जाती हैं।
base_response:
भारत में सबसे प्रतिष्ठित सौंदर्य प्रतियोगिता **Miss India** है। 

यह प्रतियोगिता हर साल आयोजित की जाती है, और इसमें भारतीय महिलाओं को उनकी प्रतिभा, शोभा और आत्मविश्वास पर आधारित कई श्रेणियों में प्रतिस्पर्धा करने का अवसर मिलता है। 

यह प्रतियोगिता भारत के लिए एक बहुत ही बड़ा और प्रसिद्ध प्रतियोगिता है, और भारतीय महिलाओं को एक विशिष्ट स्थान प्रदान करती है।

instruction: एक त्रि-आयामी गणितीय समीकरण का उदाहरण दें।
reference_output: त्रि-आयामी गणितीय समीकरण का एक उदाहरण एक क्षेत्र का है, जो समीकरण x^2 + y^2 + z^2 = r^2 द्वारा दिया गया है, जहां (x, y, z) 3D अंतरिक्ष में एक बिंदु का प्रतिनिधित्व करता है, और r मूल (0, 0, 0) पर केंद्रित क्षेत्र के त्रिज्या का प्रतिनिधित्व करता है।
base_response:
एक त्रि-आयामी गणितीय समीकरण का एक उदाहरण इस प्रकार है:

**x + 2y - z = 5**

यह समीकरण एक त्रि-आयामी समीकरण है क्योंकि इसमें तीन अंक (x, y, z) होते हैं। 

**यहाँ स्पष्टीकरण दिया गया है:**

* **x** - यह एक अचर है, जो x-अक्ष पर स्थित है। 
* **y** - यह एक अचर है, जो y-अक्ष पर स्थित है।
* **z** - यह एक अचर है, जो z-अक्ष पर स्थित है।
* **= 5** - यह समीकरण के लिए एक संबंध है, जो x, y और z के मानों के लिए एक निश्चित मान प्राप्त करने के लिए है।

यह समीकरण एक सरल त्रि-आयामी समीकरण है जो एक निश्चित मान प्राप्त करने के लिए तीन अचरों के मानों को संबोधित करता है। 


यहां कुछ और उदाहरण दिए गए हैं:

* **x² + y² + z² = 1** - यह एक त्रि-आयामी सतह का समीकरण है।
* **x² + y² - z² = 0** - यह एक त्रि-आयामी समीकरण है जो एक निश्चित सतह का प्रतिनिधित्व करता है। 
* **x = y = z** - यह एक त्रि-आयामी समीकरण है जो सभी अक्षों को समान मान प्रदान करता है।

instruction: योग के लाभों के बारे में एक सूचनात्मक पैराग्राफ लिखिए
reference_output: योग एक प्राचीन अभ्यास है जो भारत से उत्पन्न होता है जो समग्र स्वास्थ्य और कल्याण में सुधार के लिए शारीरिक मुद्रा, श्वास की तकनीक और ध्यान को जोड़ता है। योग का अभ्यास करने से लचीलापन, ताकत और संतुलन बढ़ता है, साथ ही हृदय और श्वसन स्वास्थ्य में सुधार होता है। इसके अलावा, योग ने तनाव और चिंता के स्तर को कम करने, विश्राम में सुधार करने और ध्यान केंद्रित करने और एकाग्रता में सुधार करने में लाभ साबित किया है। योग के माध्यम से स्थापित मन-शरीर संबंध दर्द प्रबंधन में भी मदद कर सकता है, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप जीवन की समग्र गुणवत्ता में सुधार होता है। अपने कई शारीरिक, मानसिक और भावनात्मक लाभों के साथ, योग किसी के स्वास्थ्य और कल्याण को बनाए रखने और सुधारने का एक शानदार तरीका है।
base_response: योग, एक प्राचीन भारतीय शास्त्रीय आध्यात्मिक और शारीरिक अभ्यास, अनेक स्वास्थ्य लाभ प्रदान करता है। यह प्राचीन संस्कृतों में "जीवन का आधार" के रूप में वर्णित है और सदियों से व्यायाम, शारीरिक और मानसिक स्वास्थ्य के लिए जाना जाता है। योग का व्यायाम शरीर को मजबूत बनाता है, कसरत और कठोरता बढ़ाता है, और तापमान, हृदय गति और श्वास की गति को नियंत्रित करता है। यह तनाव, चिंता और अवसाद को कम करने में मदद करता है, मूड को शांत करता है और संतुष्टि और आराम लाता है। योग में श्वास नियंत्रण और ध्यान के साथ-साथ विभिन्न प्राणायाम और पोजीशन शामिल हैं, जो शरीर की ताकत, स्थिरता और शक्ति को बढ़ाते हैं।  योग से शरीर और मन दोनों को स्वस्थ और शांतिपूर्ण बनाता है, जिससे जीवन की गुणवत्ता में सुधार होता है।

instruction: bhai ek easy recipe batao dinner ke liye
base_response:
Okay, here's an easy and delicious dinner recipe:

**Cheesy Chicken and Veggie Skillet**

**Ingredients:**

* 1 pound boneless, skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
* 1 tbsp olive oil
* 1 medium onion, diced
* 2 bell peppers (any color), diced
* 1 (14.5 ounce) can diced tomatoes, undrained
* 1 (10 ounce) can diced tomatoes, undrained
* 1 cup chicken broth
* 1/2 cup shredded cheddar cheese
* 1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro (optional)
* Salt and pepper to taste

**Instructions:**

1. **Sauté the veggies:** Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and peppers and cook until softened, about 5 minutes. 
2. **Add chicken and sauce:** Add chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes. Stir in diced tomatoes, chicken broth, and salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through.
3. **Add cheese and cilantro (optional):** Stir in the shredded cheese and cilantro (if using). Cook until cheese is melted and sauce is bubbly.
4. **Serve:** Serve hot with rice, quinoa, or your favorite sides.


**Tips:**

* You can add other vegetables like mushrooms, broccoli, or zucchini.
* If you like it spicier, add a pinch of red pepper flakes.
* Feel free to use different types of cheese. Mozzarella, Monterey Jack, or a Mexican blend would also be delicious. 
* This recipe is easily doubled or tripled to feed a crowd.

**Enjoy!** 


Let me know if you'd like to try another recipe! 😊

instruction: exam ke liye kaise padhu? tips do
base_response:
Here are some tips to help you ace your exams:

**Before the Exam:**

* **Understand the syllabus:**  Know what topics will be covered, and what the exam format is (multiple choice, essay, problem-solving, etc.).
* **Create a study plan:**  Divide the syllabus into manageable chunks, prioritize topics, and create a study schedule that fits your learning style.
* **Gather your resources:**  Gather all the necessary textbooks, notes, practice problems, and any other materials you'll need. 
* **Review notes and textbook:** Actively engage with the material, take notes, summarize key concepts, and practice with examples.
* **Join study groups:**  Collaborating with classmates can help you clarify concepts, discuss challenging topics, and stay motivated.
* **Seek help when needed:** Don't hesitate to ask your teacher, a tutor, or classmates for help if you're struggling with a particular concept.
* **Practice, practice, practice:** Solve past papers, practice problems, and do mock tests to familiarize yourself with the exam format and build confidence.
* **Maintain a healthy lifestyle:**  Get enough sleep, eat nutritious foods, and exercise regularly to keep your mind and body sharp.

**During the Exam:**

* **Read the instructions carefully:** Understand the format, marking scheme, and time limits before starting.
* **Manage your time:** Allocate time for each section and prioritize questions based on difficulty. 
* **Answer all questions:** Even if you don't know the answer to a question, attempt it. It's better to show effort than to leave it blank.
* **Use a strategy for tackling difficult questions:**  Break down complex problems into smaller parts, use diagrams, or skip difficult questions and come back to them later.
* **Double-check your work:** Before submitting your exam, review your answers to catch any errors. 


**After the Exam:**

* **Analyze your performance:** Reflect on your strengths and weaknesses and identify areas for improvement. 
* **Learn from mistakes:**  Don't dwell on mistakes, but use them as opportunities to learn and grow.
* **Stay positive:**  It's easy to feel discouraged after an exam. Remind yourself of your hard work and focus on the positive aspects of your preparation. 

**Remember:**

* **Stay calm and focused:**  Don't panic and take deep breaths if you feel anxious. 
* **Believe

instruction: subah jaldi uthne ke liye kya karu?
base_response:
It's great that you're looking to start your day early! Here's a breakdown of how to make the most of a quick morning routine:

**Before You Get Out of Bed:**

* **Hydrate:** Drink a large glass of water to rehydrate after sleep. 
* **Gentle Stretching:**  A few stretches can help wake up your body and increase blood flow. Focus on neck, shoulder, and back stretches.
* **Quick Exercise:**  Even 5-10 minutes of jumping jacks, squats, or yoga can get your heart pumping and mind sharp.

**The Morning Routine (Keep it Short & Sweet):**

* **Wake Up and Open the Windows:** Fresh air and sunlight can help you feel more alert.
* **Skincare:**  A quick wash, moisturizer, and some eye cream are essential.
* **Brush Your Teeth:** This is a simple but important habit.
* **Get Dressed:** Choose comfortable clothes for the day ahead.
* **Light Breakfast:**  Don't skip this! Oatmeal, yogurt, or a quick smoothie are excellent options.
* **Mindfulness/Meditation:**  Even 5 minutes of focusing on your breath or a guided meditation can set a calm and focused tone for the day.

**Before You Leave:**

* **Review Your To-Do List:**  Plan out your day so you can focus on tasks rather than getting overwhelmed.
* **Prepare Your Lunch:** If you're working from home, packing your lunch can save you time later. 
* **Set Yourself Up for Success:**  Leave your phone on silent or out of reach if you tend to get distracted by notifications.


**Remember:**

* **Listen to Your Body:**  If you're feeling tired, don't force yourself to do everything. 
* **Adjust as Needed:**  This is a template, customize it to fit your own needs and preferences.
* **Be Patient:**  It takes time to build a new habit.  Don't get discouraged if you miss a day or two.


Let me know if you'd like more specific suggestions based on your preferences!

instruction: AI kya hota hai? simple language mein samjhao
base_response:
AI, or Artificial Intelligence, is basically **a computer program that can think and act like a human**. 🧠 🤖

Think of it like this:

* **You ask a computer a question:**  You tell it what you need.
* **The computer uses its "brain" (AI) to understand you:** It looks for patterns and information to figure out what you mean.
* **The computer then gives you an answer:**  It uses what it learned to give you the best possible response.

Here are some examples of AI:

* **Chatbots:**  These are computer programs that can answer your questions and even have a conversation with you. Think of them like virtual assistants! 💬
* **Self-driving cars:** AI helps them "see" the road and make decisions to avoid obstacles. 🚗
* **Recommender systems:**  These suggest things you might like, like movies or music. 🎶
* **Medical diagnosis:** AI can help doctors diagnose diseases by analyzing medical images and data. 🩺

AI is all around us! It's becoming more and more advanced and helpful every day. 🚀

instruction: paise kaise bachaye? kuch practical tips do
base_response:
It's great you're thinking about saving!  Here are some practical tips to start saving money and build your financial security: 

**1. Understand Your Spending:**

* **Track your expenses:** Use a budgeting app, a spreadsheet, or a simple notebook to see where your money goes each month. This helps you identify areas where you can cut back.
* **Categorize your spending:**  Divide your spending into categories like housing, food, transportation, entertainment, etc. This gives you a clearer picture of your spending habits.

**2. Create a Budget:**

* **Set financial goals:**  What are you saving for? A down payment, a vacation, an emergency fund? Having a clear goal motivates you to save.
* **50/30/20 Rule:**  A good starting point is allocating 50% of your income to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings and debt repayment.
* **Prioritize needs over wants:**  Distinguish between essential expenses and things you can live without. 

**3. Reduce Expenses:**

* **Negotiate bills:** Contact your service providers (internet, phone, insurance) and try to negotiate lower rates.
* **Cut unnecessary subscriptions:**  Review streaming services, gym memberships, etc. and cancel any you don't use regularly.
* **Shop around for better deals:**  Compare prices for insurance, utilities, groceries, and other essential purchases.
* **Cook at home:** Eating out is expensive. Preparing meals at home is significantly cheaper.
* **Reduce transportation costs:**  Walk, bike, or carpool whenever possible.
* **Utilize free or low-cost entertainment:**  Look for free events in your community, explore free streaming services, or visit local parks.

**4. Automate Your Savings:**

* **Direct deposit:** Have a portion of your paycheck automatically transferred to a savings account.
* **Round-up apps:**  These apps round up your purchases to the nearest dollar and deposit the difference into your savings.
* **Automatic transfers:** Set up regular transfers from your checking account to your savings account on payday.

**5. Increase Your Income:**

* **Negotiate a raise:**  If you're eligible, ask for a salary increase at your job.
* **Side hustle:**  Consider freelancing, driving for a ride-sharing service, or doing other side gigs to earn extra income.

instruction: stress kam karne ke liye kya karu?
base_response:
It's understandable to feel stressed sometimes, everyone experiences it!  Here's a breakdown of how to handle stress and some things you can do to manage it:

**Understanding Stress**

Stress is your body's natural response to challenging or demanding situations. It's a normal part of life. But when stress becomes overwhelming, it can negatively impact your physical and mental health.

**Recognizing Stress Signs:**

* **Physical:** Headaches, muscle tension, fatigue, insomnia, digestive problems, increased heart rate, sweating
* **Emotional:** Anxiety, irritability, feeling overwhelmed, difficulty concentrating, mood swings
* **Behavioral:**  Changes in appetite or sleep patterns, withdrawal from social situations, procrastination, substance abuse

**Stress Management Strategies**

It's important to find what works best for you!  Here are some techniques:

**Lifestyle Changes:**

* **Regular Exercise:** Physical activity is a powerful stress reliever. Aim for at least 30 minutes of moderate-intensity exercise most days of the week.
* **Healthy Diet:**  Nourishing your body with nutritious foods can improve your energy levels and mood.
* **Adequate Sleep:**  Aim for 7-9 hours of quality sleep per night. 
* **Mindfulness and Relaxation Techniques:**  Meditation, deep breathing exercises, yoga, or spending time in nature can help calm your mind and body.
* **Time Management:**  Prioritize tasks, break down large projects into smaller steps, and learn to say no to avoid overcommitting.
* **Social Connections:**  Spend time with loved ones, join a club or group, or volunteer. Social support can help you feel less alone.

**Cognitive Techniques:**

* **Challenge Negative Thoughts:**  Identify and challenge negative or unhelpful thoughts that contribute to your stress.
* **Reframing:**  Try to view stressful situations from a different perspective.
* **Problem-Solving:**  If possible, actively work on solutions to stressors.
* **Humor:**  Find ways to laugh and lighten the mood.

**Seek Professional Help:**

If your stress is chronic or severe, consider reaching out to a mental health professional. They can provide support, teach you coping skills, and help you develop a personalized plan for managing stress.

**Remember:**

* **It's okay to ask for help.**  There's no shame in seeking support when you need it.
* **Be patient with yourself.**  Managing stress is an ongoing process

instruction: interview ke liye kaise prepare karu?
base_response:
Let's break down how to prepare for an interview.  

**1. Know Your Target:**

* **Research the Company:**  
    * Understand their mission, values, products/services, and recent news.
    * Identify the team you'd be joining and research their work.
    * Look at their website, social media, and professional profiles.
* **Analyze the Job Description:**
    *  Identify key skills and qualifications they're seeking.
    *  Prepare examples from your experience that showcase these skills.
    *  Think about how your skills align with their needs and how you can add value.

**2.  Prepare Your "Elevator Pitch"**

*  A concise, compelling summary of who you are, what you do, and what you're looking for.
*  Tailor it to the specific role and company you're interviewing for.

**3.  Practice, Practice, Practice:**

* **STAR Method:**  Use the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) to structure your answers to common interview questions:
    *  "Tell me about a time you failed."
    *  "Describe a time you dealt with a challenging coworker."
    *  "Give an example of a time you went above and beyond."
* **Common Interview Questions:**
    *  Tell me about yourself.
    *  Why are you interested in this position?
    *  What are your strengths and weaknesses?
    *  Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
    *  Tell me about a time you had to work as part of a team.
* **Behavioral Questions:**  Be ready to answer questions that assess your past behavior and how you handled situations. 
* **Mock Interviews:**  Practice with a friend, family member, or career counselor. Record yourself to identify areas for improvement.

**4.  Prepare Questions to Ask the Interviewer:**

*  This shows your interest and engagement.
*  Ask questions about the company culture, the team, the role, or the future of the project.
*  Avoid questions that can easily be answered with a quick Google search.

**5.  Outfit & Logistics:**

*  Dress professionally, even if the company is casual. 
*  Plan your route and arrive 10-15 minutes early.
*  Bring copies of your resume and any other relevant documents.

instruction: chai kaise banaye? step by step batao
base_response:
## Chai banane ki recipe - step by step

**Ingredients:**

* 2 cups water
* 2-3 black tea leaves (or 1 tea bag)
* 1/4 cup milk (optional, can be replaced with water)
* 1/4 teaspoon sugar (optional, adjust to taste)
* 1/4 teaspoon ginger powder (optional)
* 1/4 teaspoon cardamom powder (optional)
* Pinch of saffron strands (optional)
* 1 teaspoon lemon juice (optional)

**Equipment:**

* Kettle
* Tea pot or mug
* Small saucepan

**Instructions:**

1. **Heat the water:** Fill the kettle with water and bring it to a boil. 
2. **Add tea leaves:** Once the water is boiling, add the tea leaves (or tea bag) to the pot.
3. **Steep the tea:** Reduce the heat to low and let the tea steep for 3-5 minutes, depending on your preferred strength.
4. **Strain the tea:** Remove the tea leaves from the pot and strain the tea into a mug or teapot.
5. **Add milk and sugar (optional):** If desired, add milk and sugar to the tea. You can also add spices like ginger powder, cardamom powder, and saffron strands.
6. **Add lemon juice (optional):** Add a pinch of lemon juice for a refreshing twist.
7. **Serve:** Enjoy your freshly brewed chai!

**Tips:**

* You can experiment with different types of tea leaves, such as Assam, Darjeeling, or Ceylon.
* For a stronger chai, use more tea leaves or steep the tea for a longer time.
* You can add a pinch of salt to the tea for a more savory flavor.
* For a creamy chai, use full-fat milk.
* You can store leftover chai in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
* Garnish with a slice of ginger or a cinnamon stick for a decorative touch.

**Enjoy your homemade chai!**

instruction: resume kaise banaye? guide karo
base_response:
Here's a comprehensive guide on how to write a resume:

**1. Understand the Purpose of Your Resume**

* **Highlight your skills and experience:**  A resume is a marketing document that showcases your qualifications to potential employers. It's your chance to make a strong first impression and convince them you're the best fit for the job.
* **Target your resume:** Tailor your resume to each job you apply for. Focus on the skills and experiences that match the specific job requirements.

**2. Choose the Right Resume Format**

* **Chronological:** Most common format, lists work experience in reverse chronological order (most recent first). Suitable if you have a steady career progression and want to highlight your work history.
* **Functional:** Focuses on skills and accomplishments, rather than a strict timeline of jobs. Useful if you have gaps in your employment history, are changing careers, or have skills you want to emphasize.
* **Combination:** Combines elements of both chronological and functional formats. 
* **Targeted/Targeted Resume:** Emphasizes specific skills relevant to a particular job. This is a good choice when you're applying for a specific industry or job role.

**3. Essential Sections**

* **Contact Information:**  Name, phone number, email address, LinkedIn profile URL (optional), and professional website (optional). 
* **Summary/Profile:**  A brief, impactful statement summarizing your skills, experience, and career goals.  
* **Work Experience:** List your previous jobs in reverse chronological order, including:
    * **Job Title:**  
    * **Company Name:** 
    * **Dates of Employment:** 
    * **Key responsibilities and achievements:** Use action verbs to describe your contributions (e.g., "managed," "developed," "implemented"). Quantify your achievements whenever possible (e.g., "increased sales by 15%").
* **Education:**  List your degrees, certifications, and relevant coursework. Include your GPA (if impressive) and dates of attendance.
* **Skills:**  Highlight relevant skills, both hard (technical) and soft (interpersonal).
* **Awards and Honors:**  List any awards or recognition you've received.
* **Volunteer Experience:**  Optional, but valuable. Show your commitment to community and relevant skills.
* **Projects:**  If relevant, list personal or academic projects that showcase your abilities.
* **Languages:** List any languages you

instruction: ghar pe workout kaise kare bina equipment ke?
base_response:
## Ghar Pe Workout: Equipment-Free 🏋️‍♀️💪

You can absolutely get a great workout at home without any fancy equipment! Here's a guide to building a workout routine using your own bodyweight: 

**Warm-up (5-10 minutes):**

* **Jumping jacks:** 20 reps
* **High knees:** 20 reps per leg
* **Butt kicks:** 20 reps per leg
* **Arm circles:** 10 reps forward, 10 reps backward
* **Leg swings:** 10 reps per leg (forward and backward)

**Workout Routine (30-45 minutes):**

**Cardio:**

* **Jumping jacks:** 3 sets of 30 seconds
* **Burpees:** 3 sets of 10-12 reps
* **Mountain climbers:** 3 sets of 30 seconds
* **High knees:** 3 sets of 30 seconds
* **Butt kicks:** 3 sets of 30 seconds
* **Shadow boxing:** 3 rounds of 2 minutes

**Strength Training:**

* **Squats:** 3 sets of 15-20 reps
* **Push-ups:** 3 sets of as many reps as possible (modify on knees if needed)
* **Lunges:** 3 sets of 10-12 reps per leg
* **Plank:** Hold for 30-60 seconds, 3 sets
* **Superman:** 3 sets of 10-12 reps
* **Tricep dips:** Use a chair or bench, 3 sets of 10-12 reps
* **Calf raises:** 3 sets of 15-20 reps

**Cool-down (5-10 minutes):**

* **Stretching:** Hold each stretch for 30 seconds. Focus on your major muscle groups (hamstrings, quads, calves, chest, back, shoulders, and arms).

**Important Considerations:**

* **Consistency is key:** Aim for at least 3-4 workouts per week.
* **Listen to your body:** If you're feeling pain, stop and rest.
* **Progress gradually:** Start with fewer reps and sets and gradually increase them as you get stronger.
* **Challenge yourself:** As you get stronger, try more challenging variations of the exercises.
* **Stay hydrated:** Drink plenty

instruction: dosti ke baare mein ek choti poem likho
base_response:
## Dosti 

Ek shayad pyaar, ek shayad safar,
Dosti hai jo mere zindagi mein hai har.
Duniya mein kuch aur hain, kuch aur,
Par ye dosti, mere liye hai har khwab.

Dil se mila, roshan roshan,
Jab dil khilta hai, to yeh dost hota hai.
Har raat, har din, har baar,
Dosti ka yeh dhiman hai, aisa hai har baar.

Apni khushiyan, apni duniya,
Dosti ka saath hai, har pal, har raat.
Kya baat hai, kya baat hai,
Dosti ke saath hai, har khushi aur har dhai.

Soch ke baatein, roshan roshan,
Dosti hai, yeh har pal hai.
Khushiyan, duniya, ek hi dost,
Dosti ke naam se, har khwaab hai.

instruction: kya online padhai offline se behtar hai? apna view do
base_response:
Online and offline learning have their own advantages and disadvantages. It's really about what works best for you and your learning style.  Here's a breakdown:

**Online Learning Advantages:**

* **Flexibility:** Learn at your own pace, on your own time, from anywhere with an internet connection.
* **Accessibility:** Access to a wider range of courses and resources, including specialized topics and niche subjects.
* **Cost-effective:** Often cheaper than traditional classes, especially for self-paced learning.
* **Engaging formats:** Interactive elements like videos, quizzes, and discussions can make learning more fun and engaging.
* **Global reach:** Connect with teachers and peers from around the world.

**Offline Learning Advantages:**

* **Interaction:** Face-to-face interaction with teachers and classmates provides opportunities for immediate feedback and collaboration.
* **Structured environment:** Traditional classrooms offer a dedicated space for learning with clear schedules and deadlines.
* **Discipline:** The structure and routine of offline classes can help develop study habits and discipline.
* **Personalized attention:** Teachers can provide individual support and guidance.
* **Immediate feedback:**  Ask questions and receive immediate answers from the instructor.

**Which is better?**

Ultimately, the "better" option depends on your individual needs and preferences. Here are some questions to consider:

* **Learning style:** Do you learn better by doing, watching, or listening? 
* **Motivation and discipline:** Can you stay focused and motivated without a structured environment? 
* **Accessibility:** Do you have reliable internet access and the resources needed for online learning?
* **Cost:** Can you afford the costs associated with online courses? 
* **Social learning:** Do you value face-to-face interaction and collaboration?


Here are some scenarios where one might be more effective than the other:

* **For subjects requiring hands-on experience:**  A traditional classroom setting is better for practical skills like welding, cooking, or physical therapy.
* **For self-paced learning and accessibility:** Online learning is ideal for individuals with busy schedules, specific learning needs, or a desire for flexibility.
* **For specialized subjects or niche skills:** Online platforms offer a broader range of courses, often specializing in areas not readily available in traditional institutions. 
* **For collaborative learning and social interaction:** Traditional classes are better for students who thrive on group work and peer support.

**Ultimately, the best approach is to try both and see what works

instruction: social media acha hai ya bura? dono side batao
base_response:
Let's talk about social media - it's a double-edged sword, with both good and bad sides. 

**The Good:**

* **Connection:** Social media connects people globally, allowing us to stay in touch with friends and family, build new relationships, and even find communities based on shared interests.
* **Information:** It's a powerful tool for accessing information and news, allowing us to stay informed about current events and diverse perspectives.
* **Business and Marketing:** Businesses use social media for advertising, promoting products and services, and connecting with customers directly. 
* **Creativity and Expression:** Social media provides platforms for creative expression through photography, video, writing, music, and art. 
* **Social Activism:** Social media has become a powerful tool for raising awareness of important social issues, mobilizing people for change, and connecting individuals who are passionate about the same cause. 


**The Bad:**

* **Addiction:** Social media can be addictive, leading to excessive use and potentially negatively impacting sleep, productivity, and mental health. 
* **Cyberbullying and Harassment:** Social media can be a breeding ground for cyberbullying, harassment, and negativity, leading to emotional distress and even depression.
* **Privacy Concerns:** Social media companies collect vast amounts of data about us, raising concerns about privacy and data security. 
* **FOMO and Comparison:** Social media often presents a curated, idealized version of reality, leading to feelings of inadequacy, jealousy, and a sense of "missing out" (FOMO). 
* **Spread of Misinformation:** The rapid spread of false or misleading information can influence opinions, manipulate public opinion, and contribute to societal divisions.


**The Bottom Line:**

Social media is a powerful tool with both positive and negative impacts.  It's important to be mindful of how we use it and to use it responsibly, focusing on:

* **Mindful consumption:** Be aware of the content you consume and its potential impact on your mental health. 
* **Setting boundaries:** Limit your time on social media and prioritize real-life interactions.
* **Protecting your privacy:** Be mindful of the personal information you share and use privacy settings to protect your data.
* **Engaging with positivity:** Focus on building positive connections and seeking out content that uplifts and inspires. 


Ultimately, social media is a reflection of its users. The way we choose to interact with it can determine its impact on our lives.

instruction: weekend pe Jaipur mein ghumne ki jagah batao
base_response:
Jaipur mein weekend ka plan karne ke liye bahut hi achche options hain!  

**Here are some ideas, based on what you might like to do:**

**For the history buff:**

* **City Palace:** A stunning palace complex showcasing Rajput architecture and art. 
* **Jantar Mantar:** An astronomical observatory with fascinating instruments from the 18th century. 
* **Hawa Mahal:** The iconic "Palace of Winds" with its intricate facade.
* **Nahargarh Fort:** Offering panoramic views of the city and the Aravalli Hills.
* **Albert Hall Museum:** A grand museum with a rich collection of art, artifacts, and sculptures. 

**For the art and culture enthusiast:**

* **Sanganeri Printing Workshop:** See the traditional block printing technique in action.
* **City Palace Museum:**  Explore the royal collections of Jaipur.
* **Jawaharlal Nehru Memorial Museum:** Dedicated to the former Prime Minister, showcasing his life and work.
* **Sarojini Bazaar:** A vibrant market with a wide range of handicrafts, textiles, and jewelry.
* **Ram Niwas Garden:** A beautiful garden with fountains, lakes, and a serene atmosphere.

**For the nature lover:**

* **Galtaji Temple:** A historic temple complex in the foothills of the Aravalli Hills, known for its natural beauty. 
* **Jaigarh Fort:** A massive cannon fort offering stunning views of the city. 
* **Nahargarh Wildlife Sanctuary:** Explore the diverse wildlife of Rajasthan.
* **Amer Fort:** A majestic fort with panoramic views of the Aravalli Hills. 

**For the foodie:**

* **Chokhi Dhani:** A traditional Rajasthani village experience with live music, dance, and food.
* **Bapu Bazaar:** A bustling market with a variety of street food options. 
* **Johri Bazaar:**  Known for its delicious sweets, especially the famous Ghevar.
* **Khan-e-Kaleem:** A popular restaurant serving authentic Rajasthani cuisine.

**For the adventurous:**

* **Rajasthan Desert Safari:** Explore the Thar Desert on a camel ride or jeep safari.
* **Mount Abu:** A hill station in the Aravalli hills offering stunning views and a peaceful atmosphere. 

**To make the most of your weekend, consider:**

* **Timing:** Jaipur is hot in the summer,
